name: gdd-drift-detector
description: Fido: local design-fidelity checks for your game designs.

interface.shortDescription: Local design-fidelity checks for your game designs.
interface.longDescription: Compare your GDD with implementation symbols via offline, evidence-rich local scans. Godot 4 + GDScript today; more engines planned.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a local Fido design-fidelity (GDD drift) scan for this project.
